description_long: This object is a semi-automatic handgun with a modern, tactical design, featuring a dark, matte finish and angular contours. The grip is ergonomically shaped with a textured pattern for enhanced handling and control, and the trigger guard is robust and slightly squared for added protection. The slide is flat-topped with subtle horizontal serrations and minimalistic markings, contributing to a streamlined appearance. The barrel is of medium length, flush with the slide, and lacks visible threading or compensators. The magazine base is flat and integrated seamlessly with the grip, without any pronounced extensions or finger rests. Overall, the handgun exhibits a utilitarian aesthetic with a focus on functionality and durability.
description: A modern, dark-finished semi-automatic handgun with a textured ergonomic grip, flat slide, and minimalistic design details.
description_view_0: The left side view shows the full profile of the handgun, highlighting the textured grip, trigger guard, and slide serrations.
description_view_1: The front view displays the narrow muzzle and the width of the slide, with minimal visible detail except the barrel opening.
description_view_2: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the grip texture, slide, and trigger guard, with similar design features.
description_view_3: The rear view reveals the back of the slide and grip, emphasizing the symmetry and flatness of the magazine base.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is contoured with a pronounced curve to fit the palm, featuring a stippled or dotted texture pattern for improved traction. It appears to be made of polymer with a matte finish, and the surface is segmented with small, raised dots for enhanced grip. There are no visible logos or finger grooves, but the ergonomic shaping suggests comfort and control during use.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is thick and robust, with a slightly squared-off front edge and a gentle undercut where it meets the grip. It is integrated smoothly into the frame, providing ample space for finger placement and offering additional protection for the trigger. The surface is plain, without visible texturing or reinforcement.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is of standard, medium length and is flush with the end of the slide. It has a straight, non-threaded profile with no visible compensators, ports, or external features. The finish matches the rest of the handgun, with no distinct markings or embellishments.
attribute_slide_markings: The slide features minimalistic horizontal serrations near the rear for improved grip during operation. There are no visible manufacturer logos, model names, serial numbers, or caliber designations, giving the slide a clean and unadorned appearance.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and seamlessly integrated with the bottom of the grip. It lacks any extensions, flares, or finger rests, and there are no visible logos or texturing. The design is simple and functional, maintaining the streamlined look of the handgun.
